help.title: Quick Start for Skills Manager
help.description: The core flow is: pick a scenario, install skills, and manage enablement and sync in My Skills; use Settings for environment-level configuration.

scenarios.title: A scenario is a curated skill setup
scenarios.description: Use separate scenarios for work, learning, or open source. Each scenario keeps its own enabled skills and agent toggles.

switching.title: Switching scenarios also switches sync targets
switching.description: When you click a scenario, the app unsyncs the previous one and syncs the current scenario to detected agents.

install.title: Install from local, Git, or the market
install.description: Installed skills are stored in the central library and can be added to the current scenario immediately.

sync.title: Manage enablement and sync in My Skills
sync.description: Decide whether a skill belongs to the current scenario, then sync or unsync it for your agents.

settings.title: Use Settings as the central config hub
settings.description: Review agent status, change theme/language, set the default scenario, configure close action and tray icon, save proxy and Git remote, and check for app updates.

mySkills.title: My Skills
mySkills.subtitle: {{count}} skills from the central library are enabled in “{{scenario}}”
mySkills.searchPlaceholder: Search skills in the central library...
mySkills.deleteConfirm: Delete skill "{{name}}" permanently? This removes its central library files, scenario links, and synced agent targets.
mySkills.addFirst: Click "Install Skills" to add skills into the central library
mySkills.noMatch: No skills match the current search or filter
mySkills.syncNothingToDo: This skill already covers every installed agent
mySkills.unsyncNothingToDo: This skill is not synced to any agent yet
mySkills.gitVersionEmpty: No snapshots yet. Run Sync to Git to create one.
mySkills.gitVersionRestoreConfirm: Restore skill library to {{tag}}? This creates a new restore commit and keeps current history.
mySkills.gitVersionRestoreNeedSync: Restore is local for now. Run Sync to Git to share it with remote.

updateActions.convertWarning: Selecting a version will replace the imported files with the online version. Source type will change to '{{type}}'.
updateActions.batchConvertSuccess: Successfully converted {{count}} skill(s) to online source
updateActions.noImportSkillsWithMatches: No imported skills with online matches found

mySkills.batchDeleteConfirm: Delete {{count}} selected skills permanently? This removes their central library files, scenario links, and synced agent targets.

promptEditor.title: Prompt Editor
promptEditor.placeholder: Type your prompt here, click the arrow on a Skill to insert it at cursor...
promptEditor.dragHint: Click the arrow button to insert a Skill
promptEditor.emptySkills: No Skills enabled in current scenario

recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.skillSubsetHint: Check the Skills this Recipe uses
recipes.noRecipes: No recipes yet. Click the button above to create one.

mySkills.aiTaggingNoApiKey: Please configure CodeBuddy API Key in Settings first

install.title: Install Skills

noResults.title: No matching market skills
noResults.description: Try another keyword or clear the source filter.

toast.timeout: Installation timed out — check your network

local.title: Import a local skill source
local.description: Choose a folder that contains `SKILL.md`, or import a `.zip` or `.skill` package.

install.gitDesc: Enter a public or private Git repository URL. For private repos, ensure SSH keys are configured.
install.gitAlreadyInstalled: "{{name}}" is already installed. Reinstalling will update it.
install.aiSearchPlaceholder: AI search — describe what you need...
install.aiSearchNoKey: Set your SkillsMP API key in Settings to enable AI search

gitPreview.title: Select Skills to Import
gitPreview.description: The following skills were found in the repository. Rename them if needed, then confirm.

scan.title: Scan Local Skills
scan.initial: Scan agent skill folders already present on this machine.
scan.summary: Scanned {{tools}} tool folders and found {{skills}} importable skills.
scan.noResultsHint: Everything may already be managed, or those tool folders do not contain skills yet.
scan.listHint: Existing local skills were found and can be imported directly into the central library.
scan.listImportedHint: Everything in this scan is already in the central library.

settings.title: Settings
settings.removeCustomAgentConfirm: Remove custom agent "{{name}}"? Synced skills will be unlinked.
settings.repoPathDesc: Default storage location for all Skills and scenario configs.
settings.syncModeDesc: Symlinks are recommended — minimal disk usage with live updates.
settings.syncScopeDesc: In per-scenario mode, switching scenarios changes which skills are available to agents. In global mode, all skills stay synced to all agents — scenarios are used for prompt management only.
settings.currentScenarioDesc: Switch the app to another scenario and refresh active skills immediately.
settings.defaultScenarioDesc: Scenario loaded automatically on app launch.
settings.textSizeDesc: Adjust the app's base font size.
settings.tagline: Cross-platform. Minimal, efficient, seamless multi-scenario switching.
settings.restartToApply: Update installed. Restart the app to apply.
settings.gitBackupDesc: Back up your skill library to a Git repository for version control and multi-machine sync.
settings.proxyUrlDesc: All Git clones and network requests will route through this proxy. Leave blank to connect directly.
settings.proxyUrlInvalid: Proxy URL must start with http://, https://, or socks5://
settings.gitSyncConfigDesc: This page stores remote repository preferences only. Initialize and run sync from the My Skills page.
settings.skillsmpDesc: Enter your SkillsMP API key to enable AI-powered skill search.
settings.codebuddyApiKeyDesc: Enter your CodeBuddy API key to enable AI-powered features (auto-tagging, scenario generation).
settings.gitStartHint: If Remote URL is filled, it will clone from remote; otherwise it initializes a local repository.
settings.gitNeedRemoteSetup: Set a remote repository URL in Settings first
settings.gitNeedPullFirst: Remote has newer changes. Pull first to avoid conflicts.
settings.gitPendingSync: Local changes are ready to sync
settings.gitErrorAuth: Authentication failed. Check SSH key or access token.
settings.gitErrorNetwork: Network connection failed. Check your network and remote URL.
settings.gitErrorConflict: Sync conflict detected. Pull and resolve conflicts first.
settings.gitErrorNotRepo: Git repository not found. Start backup first.
settings.gitErrorGeneric: Git operation failed. Please check Advanced Settings and try again.
settings.closeActionDesc: Choose what happens when you click the window close button.
settings.trayIconDesc: Show an icon in the system tray for quick Show and Quit actions.
settings.trayIconOffHint: Tray icon is hidden, so closing the window will quit the app.
settings.developerModeDesc: Show detailed error messages in toast notifications for debugging.

closeAction.title: Close behavior
closeAction.message: Minimize to tray keeps the app running in the background and lets you reopen it from the tray icon.
closeAction.remember: Remember my choice for next time

common.dataOutOfDate: Some data could not be refreshed

scenario.name: Scenario Name
scenario.deleteConfirm: Delete scenario "{{name}}"? Skills will remain in the central repo.
scenario.aiCreateScenarioConfirm: AI suggests the following scenarios. Review and confirm:
scenario.untaggedWarningMessage: Over half of your skills have no tags. AI uses tags to group skills into scenarios — tagging first will produce better results.

project.title: Project Skills
project.noSkillsHint: Create a .claude/skills/ directory in the project and add skill folders.
project.scanDirPlaceholder: Enter root directory to scan, e.g. ~/Work
project.removeConfirm: Remove project "{{name}}" from the list? Project files will not be deleted.
project.selectSkillToExport: Select a skill to update into the project
project.searchCenterSkills: Search skills in the central library...
project.noSkillsToExport: No skills available to update from center
project.deleteSkillConfirm: Permanently delete skill "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
project.batchDeleteConfirm: Permanently delete {{count}} selected skills? This action cannot be undone.
